query:
-- Quota tracker hoje
SELECT date, requestsUsed, quotaLimit, (requestsUsed / quotaLimit * 100) AS percentUsed
FROM api_quota_tracker WHERE date = CURDATE();

-- Configuração global vs campeonato
SELECT 
  ps.apiFootballLeagueId AS globalLeagueId, 
  ps.apiFootballSeason AS globalSeason,
  ps.apiFootballEnabled,
  ps.apiFootballSyncFixtures,
  ps.apiFootballSyncResults,
  ps.apiFootballLastSync,
  t.id AS tournamentId,
  t.name AS tournamentName,
  t.apiFootballLeagueId AS tournamentLeagueId,
  t.apiFootballSeason AS tournamentSeason
FROM platform_settings ps
LEFT JOIN tournaments t ON t.apiFootballLeagueId IS NOT NULL
WHERE ps.id = 1;
